categories.name: Electronic Health Monitoring Devices
categories.description: Wearable or stationary diagnostic tools, such as smart scales and health trackers, that provide data-driven insights into body composition and physical metrics.

categories.name: E-books for Health
categories.description: Curated digital guides, workbooks, and manuals focused on biohacking, longevity, holistic wellness, and high-ticket affiliate strategies.

categories.name: Electronic Aroma Tools
categories.description: Advanced, app-controlled, or nebulizing diffusion devices that enhance home environments and therapeutic atmospheres through precision aromatherapy.

categories.name: Electronic Dental Care
categories.description: Next-generation oral health technology, including Bluetooth-connected smart toothbrushes, high-pressure water flossers, and professional-grade LED whitening systems.

categories.name: Electronic Eye Care
categories.description: Tech-focused solutions for vision and comfort, such as ultrasonic lens cleaners, heated compression massagers for strain relief, and specialized light therapy eyewear.

categories.name: Electronic Foot Care
categories.description: Advanced devices designed for foot health and recovery, ranging from heated soaking tubs and deep-tissue massagers to compression therapy systems.

categories.name: Electronic Hair & Scalp Care
categories.description: Scientific hair-growth solutions, including LLLT (Low-Level Laser Therapy) helmets, smart motorized scalp massagers, and high-tech ionic drying tools.

categories.name: Electronic Muscle Recovery
categories.description: High-performance tools for athletic recovery, featuring percussion massage guns and wireless electrotherapy patches for localized pain management.

categories.name: Electronic Skin Care
categories.description: Tech-forward facial treatments, including LED light therapy masks, microcurrent toning devices, and ultrasonic skin-exfoliation tools.

categories.name: Electronic Upper Body Care
categories.description: Targeted tech for the neck, shoulders, and back, such as posture-correcting vibration sensors and wearable heat-therapy wraps.

categories.name: Phone & Computer Apps for Health
categories.description: Software solutions providing recurring value, including meditation and mental wellness apps, productivity suites, and specialized biofeedback tracking.

categories.name: Sexual Awareness
categories.description: High-tech sexual wellness products, including app-controlled smart devices and premium electronic stimulators designed for intimacy and health.
